izek.k&i=A”A [सं. आर. टी-11036/80/2012-एमवीएल (i)] अभय दामले, संयु猴 सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th January, 2016 S.O. 43(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by Sections 27, 64, 110 and 137 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 (59 of 1988), the Central Government issued notification G.S.R. 27(E) dated 13.01.2015 and subsequent notification S.O.1695 dated 25.06.2015. For the proviso of rule, 47 of the above notification, the following proviso shall be substituted, namely :— “provided that upto 31st March, 2016, on and from the date of publication of the Central Motor Vehicles (Amendment) Rule, 2015, in respect of the models of the E-Rickshaws and E-Carts existing prior to publication of Central Motor Vehicles (Sixteenth Amendment) Rules, 2014 and the notification published vide S.O. 2590(E) dated 8th October, 2014, the application for registration under this sub-rule shall be made in Form 20 to the registering authority within a period of 7 days from the date of issue of Form-21 and Form-22 and shall be accompanied by – (i) Road worthiness certificate in Form-22 to be issued by the manufacturer or dealer or registered E-Rickshaw or E-Cart Association; and (ii) Sale certificate in Form 21 to be issued by manufacturer or dealer or registered E-Rickshaw or E-Cart Association for presentation along with the application for registration” [No. RT-11036/80/2012-MVL(i)] ABHAY DAMLE, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
